Ant-c..Chest: The chest remains sore, lame and bruised from the violence of the cough.
Ant-c..Chill: If he becomes slightly overheated he fairly boils with perspiration and then takes cold.
Ant-c..Extremities: all the pains and aches of the body are worse from sour wine; headaches come from this cause and the gastric disturbances are greatly aggravated from sour wine.
Ant-c..Extremities, coldness: the gouty symptoms come back into the extremities.
Ant-c..Generalities: You will be surprised, when studying full provings of this substance, to notice that all the symptoms seem to centre about the stomach; it does not matter much what kind of complaints he suffers from the stomach takes part in it.
Ant-c..Head: He often has an attack of sick headache and it will be called by the family a gastric sick headache, but the condition just mentioned comes on from taking cold, which slacks up the thick discharge into a dryness of the nose and the inhaled air burns the nose like fire.
Ant-c..Mind: It produces a very serious state in the mind, an absence of the desire to live. It is well known to physicians that the case is a serious one if the patient has no desire to live; life is a burden.
Ant-c..Mind, irritability: Every thing seems to disturb him. He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him.
Ant-c..Mouth: The whole tongue is covered with a milk-white coating. This you find in all diseases where the remedy is indicated.
Ant-c..Rectum: Inflammation of the rectum and colon, with suffering, much tenesmus, prolonged efforts and great exhaustion.
Ant-c..Rectum, constipation: He hurries to stool and passes a little lump and some liquid, and is soon hurried again to stool and more lumps and liquid are passed.
Ant-c..Skin: The skin is ulcerated and has a tendency to grow warts, callosities, bad nails and bad hair.
Ant-c..Stomach: Constant nausea, lump in the stomach, feeling all the time as if he had an overloaded stomach, as if he had eaten too much, and that is when he had not eaten at all.
Ant-c..Stomach, eructations: The stomach feels distended although the abdomen is flat. He feels distended and vomits the contents of the stomach; he vomits slime after he has emptied the stomach of its contents; prolonged retching, nausea, sickening load in the stomach and it seems to go on and on.
Ant-c..Abdomen, pain: In the abdomen we have a group of symptoms; violent abdominal pains, burning, great distension; there appears to be an increasing distension as if by a screw, gradually forcing down upon something gradually increasing the tension.
Ant-c..Generalities, weakness: Moments of great exhaustion, sudden attacks of weakness and fainting.
Ant-c..Appetite: He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him.
Ant-c..Appetite, aversion: He has loathing of food; the thought and smell of food disturb him. This is like Arsenicum.
Ant-c..Clinical: Troublesome hemorrhoids in old gouty constitutions. They are always sore and inflamed from a cold, wet day, from cold bathing and, are always worse if he is foolish enough to drink sour wine or take sour food.
Ant-c..Mind, night: This patient is worse at night, worse in damp weather, worse from damp cold, better from lying down quietly, better from applied heat, but much worse from over-heating and from radiated heat, and in a warm room.
Ant-c..Abdomen: In the abdomen we have a group of symptoms; violent abdominal pains, burning, great distension; there appears to be an increasing distension as if by a screw, gradually forcing down upon something gradually increasing the tension.
